input.background: Joseph Lister (1827-1912) demonstrated that postoperative mortality dropped from 16 fatalities in 35 procedures to 6 fatalities in 40 procedures after adopting antiseptic surgical techniques.
input.question: Determine the risks of postoperative mortality in each group.

output.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

initial_procedures.description: The number of surgical procedures performed before adopting antiseptic techniques.

initial_fatalities.description: The number of fatalities in the initial group before adopting antiseptic techniques.

post_antiseptic_procedures.description: The number of surgical procedures performed after adopting antiseptic techniques.

post_antiseptic_fatalities.description: The number of fatalities in the group after adopting antiseptic techniques.
